## Highlights

- Added settings for automatic update checks and the app update channel, with safe defaults for existing and invalid saved settings.
- Refined the Settings window layout and replaced binary usage and reset-time toggles with clearer selectors.
- Improved update-check feedback, accessible help text, and the up-to-date confirmation shown after a manual check.

**Full changelog:** [v0.2.0...v0.2.1](https://github.com/CallMeLewis/UsageDeck/compare/v0.2.0...v0.2.1)
